labels.ideal_content_profile: Wedding-day montages — getting-ready details, first looks, ceremony moments, reception dancing.
Wedding ceremony storytelling — close-ups of vows, first-look reveals, ring exchanges, emotional reaction beats.
Slow handheld wedding b-roll — hands, candid hugs, first-look quiet moments.
Build-and-drop celebratory montages, dance-floor energy, confetti payoffs.
Street fashion, swagger walks, fast cuts.
